```{r}
    region       = str_extract(identifier_1, regex("Barb|Shaft", ignore_case = TRUE)),
    region       = if_else(is.na(region), "homogenate", region),
    Specimen_ID  = str_extract(identifier_1, "^[^_]+")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(Specimen_ID, Feather_type, region, amount, normalised_d15n, normalised_d13c) %>% 
  mutate(amount = as.numeric(amount), 
         normalised_d15n = as.numeric(normalised_d15n), 
         normalised_d13c = as.numeric(normalised_d13c)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(normalised_d15n, normalised_d13c),
    names_to = "isotope",
    values_to = "value"
  )

O_dat <-
  read_excel(here("data/Master_TCEA_O_SI_Breast Feathers_Replication_Batch 4_LEH_Sept25_SB.xls"), 
                     sheet = "Sample results_O", 
                     col_types = "text", skip = 6, col_names = TRUE) %>%
    rename_with(~ .x %>%
                tolower() %>%
                str_replace_all(" ", "_") %>%
                str_replace_all("__", "_") %>%
                str_replace_all("___", "_") %>%
                str_replace_all("%", "_perc_") %>%
                str_replace_all(":", "") %>%
                str_replace_all("#", "")) %>%
  dplyr::select(sia_id, `amount`, 
         ampl_28, normalised_d18o) %>% 
    filter(!is.na(normalised_d18o)) %>%
  slice(16:44) %>% 
  mutate(
    Feather_type = "Breast",
    region       = "homogenate") %>% 
  rename(Specimen_ID  = sia_id) %>% 
  dplyr::select(Specimen_ID, Feather_type, region, amount, normalised_d18o) %>% 
  mutate(amount = as.numeric(amount), 
         normalised_d18o = as.numeric(normalised_d18o)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(normalised_d18o),
    names_to = "isotope",
    values_to = "value"
  )

H_dat <-
  read_excel(here("data/Master_TCEA_H_SI_BATCH 4 BREAST Feathers_LE_Nov25_v1.xls"), 
                     sheet = "Sample results_H", 
                     col_types = "text", skip = 9, col_names = TRUE) %>%
    rename_with(~ .x %>%
                tolower() %>%
                str_replace_all(" ", "_") %>%
                str_replace_all("__", "_") %>%
                str_replace_all("___", "_") %>%
                str_replace_all("%", "_perc_") %>%
                str_replace_all(":", "") %>%
                str_replace_all("#", "")) %>%
  dplyr::select(sia_id, ampl_2, normalised_d2h) %>% 
    filter(!is.na(normalised_d2h)) %>% 
  mutate(
    Feather_type = "Breast",
    region       = "homogenate") %>% 
  rename(Specimen_ID  = sia_id) %>% 
  dplyr::select(Specimen_ID, Feather_type, region, normalised_d2h) %>% 
  mutate(normalised_d2h = as.numeric(normalised_d2h)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(normalised_d2h),
    names_to = "isotope",
    values_to = "value"
  )

CNOH_dat <- 
  bind_rows(O_dat, CN_dat, H_dat)

CNOH_dat %>% 
  group_by(Specimen_ID) %>% 
  summarise(n_isotopes = n_distinct(isotope)) %>% 
  pull(n_isotopes) %>%
  table()
```

### import and wrangle sample meta data

```{r}
# import meta data for all museum samples and add spatial data.
meta_data <-
  read_excel(here("data/MASTER_museum_ALL SAMPLES INVENTORY_banded_dotterels_v4.xlsx"), 
             col_types = "text") %>% 
  mutate(Specimen_ID_ = str_remove(Specimen_ID, regex(" (Breast|Primary)$", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  mutate(Specimen_ID_ = str_remove_all(Specimen_ID_, regex("AJB ", ignore_case = TRUE)))  %>%
  mutate(Specimen_ID_ = str_remove_all(Specimen_ID_, regex(" -", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>% 
  dplyr::select(Feather_type, Specimen_ID, Specimen_ID_, General_collection_location, 
         Specific_collection_location, Collection_date) %>% 
  mutate(Month = str_extract(Collection_date, "(January|February|March|April|May|June|July|August|September|October|November|December)")) %>%
  mutate(Month = match(tolower(Month), tolower(month.name))) %>%
  mutate(
    month_extracted = sapply(Collection_date, extract_month),
    Month = ifelse(is.na(Month) & !is.na(month_extracted), month_extracted, Month),
    Year = sapply(Collection_date, extract_year)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-month_extracted) %>% 
  mutate(location = paste(Specific_collection_location, General_collection_location, sep = ", ")) %>%
  mutate(location = str_replace_all(location, "NA, ", "")) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(Specimen_ID))

meta_data %>% filter(Specimen_ID_ == "AV1740")

# Create a data frame 
df <- data.frame(location = meta_data$location)

# Remove duplicates to avoid redundant API calls
unique_locations <- unique(df$location)

# Get latitude and longitude for unique locations
geocode_data <- geocode(unique_locations)

# Combine the geocode data with the unique locations
location_data <- 
  data.frame(location = unique_locations, geocode_data) %>%
  filter(!is.na(location)) %>% arrange(lat)

meta_data_ <-
  left_join(meta_data, location_data, by = "location") %>% 
  dplyr::select(-c(Feather_type, Specimen_ID)) %>%
  distinct() %>% 
  rename(Specimen_ID = Specimen_ID_)
```

### merge C, N, O, and H data with metadata

```{r}
meta_data_ %>% filter(Specimen_ID == "AV1740")
CNOH_dat %>% filter(Specimen_ID == "AV1740")

CNOH_dat_meta <-
  stringdist_left_join(
    CNOH_dat, meta_data_,
    by = "Specimen_ID",
    method = "cosine", # Jaro-Winkler distance
    # max_dist = 1,         # tweak based on how much difference you allow
    distance_col = "dist"
  ) %>% #filter(Specimen_ID.y == "AV1740" | Specimen_ID.x == "AV1740") %>% group_by(Specimen_ID.x) %>% arrange(dist)
  group_by(Specimen_ID.x, Feather_type, region, isotope) %>% arrange(dist) %>% slice(1) %>%
  dplyr::select(Specimen_ID.x, Specimen_ID.y, dist, everything()) %>% ungroup() %>% arrange(desc(dist)) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-c(Specimen_ID.y, dist)) %>% 
  rename(Specimen_ID = Specimen_ID.x) %>% 
  mutate(geo_region = ifelse(str_detect(location, "Australia"), "Australia", 
                             ifelse(str_detect(location, "New Zealand"), "New Zealand", NA))) %>% 
  mutate(geo_region_bin = ifelse(geo_region == "Australia", 1, 0)) %>%
  mutate(
    month_name = month.name[Month],          # full month names
    month_abbrev = month.abb[Month],         # abbreviated names
    month_factor = factor(Month, levels = 1:12, labels = month.name, ordered = TRUE) # ordered factor
  ) %>% 
  mutate(lon = ifelse(lon < 0, lon + 180*2, lon))
```

### merge with the triplicate data for a full dataset

```{r}
triplicate_CNOH_dat_meta <- 
  triplicate_CNOH_dat_meta %>% 
  mutate(region = "homogenate")

CNOH_dat_meta <- 
  CNOH_dat_meta %>% 
  mutate(feather = NA)

CNOH_dat_meta_full <- 
  bind_rows(triplicate_CNOH_dat_meta, CNOH_dat_meta) %>% 
  dplyr::select(Specimen_ID, Feather_type, feather, region, amount, 
                isotope, lon, lat, geo_region, geo_region_bin, value, Collection_date, Month, Year, Specific_collection_location) %>% 
  group_by(isotope) %>%                # scale within each isotope type
  mutate(value_scaled = as.numeric(scale(value))) %>%
  group_by(Specimen_ID, Feather_type,
                isotope, lon, lat, geo_region, geo_region_bin, Collection_date, Month, Year, Specific_collection_location) %>%
  summarise(mean_value = mean(value_scaled))

saveRDS(CNOH_dat_meta_full, file = "data/CNOH_museum_samples_201125.rds")

# CNOH_dat_meta_full <- 
#   bind_rows(triplicate_CNOH_dat_meta, CNOH_dat_meta) %>% 
#   dplyr::select(Specimen_ID, Feather_type, feather, region, amount, everything()) %>% 
#   group_by(Specimen_ID, Feather_type, isotope, General_collection_location,
#            Specific_collection_location, Month, location, lon, lat, geo_region, 
#            geo_region_bin, month_name, month_abbrev, month_factor) %>% 
#   summarise(mean_value = mean(value))
```

### exploration of CNOH breast feathers

```{r}
CNOH_dat_meta_full <- readRDS(file = "data/CNOH_museum_samples_201125.rds")
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(leaflet)
library(viridisLite)

# Prepare data ----
CNOH_map <- 
  CNOH_dat_meta_full %>% 
  # select(-value_scaled) %>% 
  # group_by(Specimen_ID, isotope, Feather_type) %>% 
  # mutate(mean_value = mean(value)) %>% 
  # dplyr::select(-c(feather, value, amount, value, region)) %>% 
  # distinct() %>% 
  group_by(isotope) %>%                # scale within each isotope type
  mutate(mean_value_scaled = as.numeric(scale(mean_value))) %>%
  # filter(Feather_type == "Breast") %>%
  filter(Month %in% c(5,6,7,8)) %>% 
  # filter((Month %in% c(6,7,) & geo_region == "New Zealand") | (Month %in% c(6,7,8,9,10,11) & geo_region == "Australia")) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  group_by(Specimen_ID) %>% 
  mutate(n_feather_types = n_distinct(Feather_type)) %>%
                   mutate(
                     Month = factor(Month, levels = 1:12, labels = month.abb)
                   ) #%>% 
  # filter(n_feather_types == 2)
  # dplyr::select(Specimen_ID, Feather_type, isotope, lon, lat, Month, Year, Specific_collection_location, mean_value) %>% 
  # group_by(isotope) %>%                # scale within each isotope type
  # mutate(mean_value_scaled = as.numeric(scale(mean_value)))

iso_sf <- 
  CNOH_map %>% 
  mutate(isotope = ifelse(isotope == "normalised_d13c", "d13C",
                           ifelse(isotope == "normalised_d15n", "d15N",
                                  ifelse(isotope == "normalised_d2h", "d2H", "d18O")))) %>% 
  filter(Feather_type == "Breast") %>% 
  st_as_sf(., coords = c("lon", "lat"), crs = 4326)
iso_sf <- st_transform(iso_sf, 3857)  # Web Mercator
  
library(ggplot2)
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(patchwork)
library(ggforce)

# your sf object: iso_sf
# columns: isotope, mean_value, geometry (POINTS)

# get basemap
world <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")

# restrict map to Australia + New Zealand region
region_bbox <- st_bbox(c(xmin = 110, xmax = 180, ymin = -55, ymax = -0), crs = st_crs(world))
world_region <- st_crop(world, region_bbox)

# example palettes per isotope
isotope_palettes <- list(
  "d13C" = scale_color_viridis_c(option = "plasma", name = expression(delta^13*C[scaled])),
  "d15N" = scale_color_viridis_c(option = "magma", name = expression(delta^15*N[scaled])),
  "d2H"  = scale_color_viridis_c(option = "viridis", name = expression(delta^2*H[scaled])),
  "d18O" = scale_color_viridis_c(option = "cividis", name = expression(delta^18*O[scaled]))
)

# helper to make per-isotope map
make_iso_plot <- function(iso_name, xlim_, y_lim_) {
  data_ = filter(iso_sf, isotope == iso_name) %>%
    mutate(geometry = st_jitter(geometry, amount = 30000))
  
  ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = world_region, fill = "grey90", color = "white", size = 0.1) +
    geom_sf(
      data = data_,
      aes(color = mean_value_scaled),
      size = 2,
      alpha = 0.8
    ) +
    isotope_palettes[[iso_name]] +
    
    # ---- HORIZONTAL COLORBAR INSIDE PLOT ----
    guides(
      color = guide_colorbar(
        direction = "horizontal",
        title.position = "left",
        barwidth = unit(100, "pt"),
        barheight = unit(10, "pt")
      )
    ) +
    luke_theme +
    theme(
      legend.position = c(0, 0),              # inside panel
      legend.justification = c(0, 0),             # anchor bottom-left
      legend.background = element_blank(),
      legend.key.height = unit(4, "pt"),
      legend.key.width = unit(40, "pt"),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 15),
      
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey95"),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
    ) +
    
    coord_sf(
      xlim = xlim_,
      ylim = y_lim_,
      expand = FALSE
    )
}

# build and combine plots
AU_NZ_plots <- 
  lapply(unique(iso_sf$isotope), function(x) {
  make_iso_plot(iso_name = x, xlim_ = c(130, 180), y_lim_ = c(-50, -32))
})
final_AU_NZ_plot <- wrap_plots(AU_NZ_plots, ncol = 2)
final_AU_NZ_plot

VIC_TAS_plots <- 
  lapply(unique(iso_sf$isotope), function(x) {
  make_iso_plot(iso_name = x, xlim_ = c(140, 150), y_lim_ = c(-45, -35))
})
final_VIC_TAS_plot <- wrap_plots(VIC_TAS_plots, ncol = 2)
final_VIC_TAS_plot

NZ_plots <- 
  lapply(unique(iso_sf$isotope), function(x) {
  make_iso_plot(iso_name = x, xlim_ = c(165, 180), y_lim_ = c(-47, -35))
})
final_NZ_plot <- wrap_plots(NZ_plots, ncol = 2)
final_NZ_plot


CNOH_map %>% 
      filter(Feather_type == "Breast") %>% 
      filter(!is.na(Month)) %>% 
  # filter(Specific_collection_location == "Ralphs Bay") %>% 
  group_by(isotope, Month) %>% 
    summarise(n_inds = n_distinct(Specimen_ID)) %>% 
  filter(Month == "Jul")

iso_labels <- c(
  "normalised_d13c" = "delta^{13}*C",
  "normalised_d15n" = "delta^{15}*N",
  "normalised_d2h"  = "delta^{2}*H",
  "normalised_d18o" = "delta^{18}*O"
)

ggplot() +
  geom_bar(
    data = CNOH_map %>% 
      filter(Feather_type == "Breast"), #%>% 
      # filter(!is.na(Month)),
    aes(x = Month)
  ) +
  ylab("number of specimens") +
  facet_grid(geo_region ~ isotope,
             labeller = labeller(isotope = as_labeller(iso_labels, label_parsed))) +
  luke_theme  +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines"),
    legend.position = "none",
    
    # Rotate vertical strip text
    strip.text.x = element_text(size = 15),  # 0 = horizontal, 90 = vertical
    strip.background = element_blank()
  )

CNOH_map %>% filter(n_feather_types == 2)

# Initialize leaflet map ----
leaflet_map <- leaflet(options = leafletOptions(preferCanvas = TRUE)) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$OpenStreetMap, group = "Terrain") %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$Esri.WorldImagery, group = "Satellite")   # background map

# Loop through isotopes ----
for (iso in unique(CNOH_map$isotope)) {
  df <- CNOH_map %>% filter(isotope == iso)
  if (nrow(df) == 0) next  # skip if no data
  
  # Dynamically assign palette
  pal_option <- switch(iso,
                       "normalised_d13c" = "plasma",
                       "normalised_d15n" = "magma",
                       "normalised_d2h"  = "viridis",
                       "normalised_d18o" = "cividis",
                       "viridis") # default fallback
  
  pal <- colorNumeric(
    palette = viridis(100, option = pal_option),
    domain = df$mean_value_scaled
  )
  
  # Add markers and legend for this isotope
  leaflet_map <- leaflet_map %>%
    addCircleMarkers(
      data = df,
      lng = ~lon,
      lat = ~lat,
      color = ~pal(mean_value_scaled),
      radius = 25,
      stroke = FALSE,
      fillOpacity = 0.8,
      popup = ~paste0(
        "<b>Specimen ID:</b> ", Specimen_ID, "<br>",
        "<b>Month:</b> ", Month, "<br>",
        "<b>Year:</b> ", Year, "<br>",
        "<b>Location:</b> ", Specific_collection_location, "<br>",
        "<b>Mean value:</b> ", round(mean_value_scaled, 2), "<br>",
        "<b>Lon / Lat:</b> ", paste0(round(lon, 2), " / ", round(lat, 2)), "<br>",
        "<b>Feather type:</b> ", Feather_type
      ),
      group = iso,
      clusterOptions = markerClusterOptions(
        spiderfyOnMaxZoom = TRUE,
        spiderfyDistanceMultiplier = 3  # <-- longer spiderfy arms
      )
    ) %>%
    addLegend(
      "bottomleft",
      pal = pal,
      values = df$mean_value_scaled,
      title = iso,
      opacity = 1,
      layerId = paste0("legend_", iso)
    )
}

# Add layer control and zoom to bounds ----
leaflet_map <- leaflet_map %>%
  addLayersControl(
    baseGroups = c("Terrain", "Satellite"),
    overlayGroups = unique(CNOH_map$isotope),
    options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
  ) %>%
  fitBounds(
    lng1 = min(CNOH_map$lon, na.rm = TRUE),
    lat1 = min(CNOH_map$lat, na.rm = TRUE),
    lng2 = max(CNOH_map$lon, na.rm = TRUE),
    lat2 = max(CNOH_map$lat, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

# Display the map ----
leaflet_map
```


```{r}
CNOH_wide <- 
  CNOH_dat_meta_full %>% 
  filter(Feather_type == "Breast") %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    isotope = case_when(
      isotope == "normalised_d13c" ~ "d13C",
      isotope == "normalised_d15n" ~ "d15N",
      isotope == "normalised_d2h"  ~ "d2H",
      isotope == "normalised_d18o" ~ "d18O",
      TRUE ~ isotope
    )
  ) %>%
  # average across repeated isotope measurements per specimen
  # group_by(Specimen_ID, Feather_type, isotope, lon, lat, geo_region_bin, Month) %>%
  # summarise(mean_value = mean(value)) %>%
  group_by(isotope) %>%                # scale within each isotope type
  mutate(mean_value_scaled = as.numeric(scale(mean_value)),
         # feather = ifelse(is.na(feather), "A", feather),
         isotope = as.factor(isotope)) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  filter(Month %in% c("5", "6", "7", "8")) %>% 
  select(-mean_value) %>% 
  # pivot to wide format
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = isotope,
    values_from = mean_value_scaled
  )

# sample size
CNOH_dat_meta_full %>%
  filter(Feather_type == "Breast", Month %in% c("5", "6", "7", "8")) %>%
  mutate(isotope_clean = str_remove(isotope, "normalised_")) %>%
  group_by(Specimen_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    combo = paste(sort(unique(isotope_clean)), collapse = "+"),
    n_isotopes = n_distinct(isotope_clean)
  ) %>%
  count(n_isotopes, combo, name = "n_individuals") %>%
  arrange(desc(n_isotopes), desc(n_individuals))

```

#### linear mixed model
```{r}
# CNOH_dat_meta_full_s <- 
#   bind_rows(triplicate_CNOH_dat_meta, CNOH_dat_meta) %>%
#   mutate(
#     isotope = case_when(
#       isotope == "normalised_d13c" ~ "d13C",
#       isotope == "normalised_d15n" ~ "d15N",
#       isotope == "normalised_d2h"  ~ "d2H",
#       isotope == "normalised_d18o" ~ "d18O",
#       TRUE ~ isotope
#     )
#   ) %>% 
#   filter(Feather_type == "Breast", Month %in% c("5", "6", "7", "8")) %>% 
#   select(Specimen_ID, feather, isotope, value, lon, lat, geo_region_bin) %>% 
#   group_by(Specimen_ID, feather, isotope, lon, lat, geo_region_bin) %>% 
#   summarise(mean_value = mean(value)) %>%
#   group_by(isotope) %>%                # scale within each isotope type
#   mutate(mean_value_scaled = as.numeric(scale(mean_value)),
#          feather = ifelse(is.na(feather), "A", feather),
#          isotope = as.factor(isotope)) %>%
#   ungroup()

CNOH_dat_meta_full_s_ <- 
  CNOH_dat_meta_full %>% 
  group_by(isotope) %>%                # scale within each isotope type
  mutate(mean_value_scaled = as.numeric(scale(mean_value))) %>% 
  # group_by(Specimen_ID, isotope, Feather_type) %>% 
  # mutate(mean_value_scaled = mean(value_scaled)) %>% 
  # dplyr::select(-c(feather, value, amount, value_scaled, region)) %>% 
  distinct() %>% 
  filter(Feather_type == "Breast") %>%
  filter((Month %in% c(5,6,7,8) & geo_region == "New Zealand") | (Month %in% c(5,6,7,8,9,10,11,12) & geo_region == "Australia")) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  filter(lon > 130)

CNOH_full_mod1 <- 
  glmer(geo_region_bin ~ mean_value_scaled + (1 | isotope), 
       data = CNOH_dat_meta_full_s_, family = binomial)

summary(CNOH_full_mod1)
exp(coef(CNOH_full_mod1))

CNOH_lon_mod2 <- 
  lmer(mean_value_scaled ~ lon + lat + (1 | isotope), 
       data = CNOH_dat_meta_full_s_)

CNOH_reg_lat_full_mod <- 
  lmer(mean_value_scaled ~ geo_region + lat + (1 | isotope),
       data = CNOH_dat_meta_full_s_)
summary(CNOH_reg_lat_full_mod)
plot(allEffects(CNOH_reg_lat_full_mod))

CNOH_reg_lat_CN_mod <- 
  lmer(mean_value_scaled ~ geo_region + lat + (1 | isotope),
       data = CNOH_dat_meta_full_s_ %>% filter(isotope %in% c("normalised_d13c", "normalised_d15n")))
summary(CNOH_reg_lat_CN_mod)
plot(allEffects(CNOH_reg_lat_CN_mod))

CNOH_reg_lat_CN_mod <- 
  glmer(geo_region_bin ~ mean_value_scaled + lat + (1 | isotope),
       data = CNOH_dat_meta_full_s_ %>% filter(isotope %in% c("normalised_d13c", "normalised_d15n")),
       family = binomial)
summary(CNOH_reg_lat_CN_mod)
plot(allEffects(CNOH_reg_lat_CN_mod))

CNOH_reg_lat_CNH_mod <- 
  lmer(mean_value_scaled ~ geo_region + lat + (1 | isotope),
       data = CNOH_dat_meta_full_s_ %>% filter(isotope %in% c("normalised_d13c", "normalised_d15n", "normalised_d2h")))
summary(CNOH_reg_lat_CNH_mod)
plot(allEffects(CNOH_reg_lat_CNH_mod))

# 1️⃣ Create new data for prediction
newdata <- CNOH_dat_meta_full_s_ %>% filter(isotope %in% c("normalised_d13c", "normalised_d15n")) %>%
  group_by(isotope) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_value_scaled = seq(min(mean_value_scaled), max(mean_value_scaled), length.out = 50),
    lat = mean(lat)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# 2️⃣ Predict probabilities AND standard errors for CI
pred <- predict(CNOH_reg_lat_CN_mod, newdata, type = "link", se.fit = TRUE)

# Calculate predicted probability and 95% CI
newdata <- newdata %>%
  mutate(
    fit_link = pred$fit,
    se_link = pred$se.fit,
    # logistic transformation
    pred_prob = plogis(fit_link),
    lower = plogis(fit_link - 1.96 * se_link),
    upper = plogis(fit_link + 1.96 * se_link)
  )

# 3️⃣ Plot raw data + predicted probability + confidence intervals
ggplot() +
  # raw data
  geom_jitter(data = CNOH_dat_meta_full_s_ %>% filter(isotope %in% c("normalised_d13c", "normalised_d15n")), 
              aes(x = mean_value_scaled, y = geo_region_bin, color = isotope), 
              width = 0.1, height = 0.02, alpha = 0.6) +
  # predicted probability curves
  geom_line(data = newdata, aes(x = mean_value_scaled, y = pred_prob), size = 1.2) +
  # confidence interval ribbons
  geom_ribbon(data = newdata, aes(x = mean_value_scaled, ymin = lower, ymax = upper), 
              alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Scaled isotope value",
    y = "Probability of having wintered in Australia",
    title = "Predicted probability by scaled value and isotope with raw data"
  )

library(glmmTMB)

# Build a spatial covariance structure using 'exp' (exponential)
glm_fit <- glmmTMB(
  geo_region_bin ~ mean_value_scaled + isotope + 
    (1 | gr(lon + lat, cov = "exp")),  # spatial random effect
  data = CNOH_dat_meta_full_s,
  family = binomial
)
  
install.packages("spaMM")
library(spaMM)

glm_fit <- fitme(
  geo_region_bin ~ mean_value_scaled + isotope + Matern(1 | lon + lat),
  data = CNOH_dat_meta_full_s,
  family = binomial()
)

# For each isotope, create a sequence of mean_value_scaled and include coordinates
# If you have multiple locations per isotope, you can just pick a representative point
# or expand predictions for each existing location

newdata <- CNOH_dat_meta_full_s %>%
  group_by(isotope) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_value_scaled = seq(min(mean_value_scaled), max(mean_value_scaled), length.out = 50),
    lon = mean(lon),   # use mean lon for that isotope
    lat = mean(lat)    # use mean lat for that isotope
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Predict
pred <- predict(glm_fit, newdata, type = "response")
newdata$pred_prob <- pred

# Plot
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(newdata, aes(x = mean_value_scaled, y = pred_prob, color = isotope)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Scaled value",
    y = "Predicted probability of geo_region_bin = 1",
    title = "Predicted probabilities by isotope (spaMM model)"
  )
```


```{r}
# install.packages("VIM")
library(VIM)
CNOH_imputed <- kNN(CNOH_wide, variable = c("d13C","d15N","d2H","d18O"), k = 5)
```

#### specimens with all 4 isotopes
```{r}
# run PCA on isotopes
CNOH_wide_no_nas <- CNOH_wide %>% na.omit()

pca <- prcomp(CNOH_wide_no_nas[, c("d13C", "d15N", "d2H", "d18O")], scale. = TRUE)

# add PC scores
iso_pca <- cbind(CNOH_wide_no_nas, pca$x[, 1:2])

# logistic model on PC axes
m_pca <- glm(geo_region_bin ~ PC1 + PC2, data = iso_pca, family = binomial)
summary(m_pca)

ggplot(iso_pca, aes(PC1, PC2, color = as.factor(geo_region_bin))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(color = "Country (1=AU)")


library(MASS)

# Remove rows with any missing isotopes
iso_lda <- CNOH_wide %>%
  drop_na(d13C, d15N, d2H, d18O)

# Make geo_region_bin a factor (required by lda)
iso_lda <- iso_lda %>%
  mutate(region = factor(geo_region_bin, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("NZ", "AU")))

# Run LDA
lda_model <- lda(region ~ d13C + d15N + d2H + d18O, data = iso_lda)

# View results
lda_model

# Get predictions
pred <- predict(lda_model)

# Add to dataframe
iso_lda <- iso_lda %>%
  mutate(LD1 = pred$x[, 1],
         predicted = pred$class)

# Confusion matrix
table(Observed = iso_lda$region, Predicted = iso_lda$predicted)

# Classification accuracy
mean(iso_lda$region == iso_lda$predicted)

ggplot(iso_lda, aes(x = LD1, fill = region)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "LDA separation between AU and NZ individuals",
       x = "Linear Discriminant 1", fill = "Region")

ggplot(iso_lda, aes(x = LD1, y = 0, color = region)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0, height = 0.05, size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "LD1", y = NULL, title = "LDA projection")

lda_cv <- lda(region ~ d13C + d15N + d2H + d18O, data = iso_lda, CV = TRUE)

# Accuracy
mean(lda_cv$class == iso_lda$region)

# Confusion matrix
table(Observed = iso_lda$region, Predicted = lda_cv$class)

ggplot(iso_lda, aes(x = region, y = LD1, color = region)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 4, shape = 23, fill = "white") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("AU" = "#E69F00", "NZ" = "#56B4E9")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(title = "LDA Separation by Region",
       y = "LD1 score",
       x = "Region")

# Assuming lda_model is already fitted
lda_coeff <- lda_model$scaling[, 1]  # LD1 coefficients
lda_coeff_df <- data.frame(
  isotope = rownames(lda_model$scaling),
  coefficient = lda_coeff
) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(coefficient)))  # order by absolute contribution

ggplot(lda_coeff_df, aes(x = reorder(isotope, coefficient), y = coefficient, fill = coefficient > 0)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.7) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#E69F00", "FALSE" = "#56B4E9"), guide = "none") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Contribution of isotopes to LD1",
    x = "Isotope",
    y = "LD1 coefficient"
  )

# --- LDA model (already fitted) ---
lda_model <- lda(region ~ d13C + d15N + d2H + d18O, data = iso_lda)

# --- LD1 scores ---
lda_pred <- predict(lda_model)
lda_df <- data.frame(CNOH_wide, LD1 = lda_pred$x[, 1])

# --- LD1 density plot ---
p1 <- ggplot(iso_lda, aes(x = LD1, fill = region)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("AU" = "#E69F00", "NZ" = "#56B4E9")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "LDA separation by region",
    x = "LD1",
    y = "Density",
    fill = "Region"
  )

# --- Extract LD1 coefficients (loadings) ---
lda_coeff_df <- data.frame(
  isotope = rownames(lda_model$scaling),
  coefficient = lda_model$scaling[, 1]
) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(coefficient)))

# --- Isotope contribution bar plot ---
p2 <- ggplot(lda_coeff_df, aes(x = reorder(isotope, coefficient), y = coefficient, fill = coefficient > 0)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.7) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#E69F00", "FALSE" = "#56B4E9"), guide = FALSE) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Contribution of isotopes to LD1",
    x = "Isotope",
    y = "LD1 coefficient"
  )

# --- Combine plots with patchwork ---
combined_plot <- p1 / p2 + plot_layout(heights = c(2, 1))
combined_plot

library(caret)

set.seed(123)
train_control <- trainControl(method = "LOOCV")

lda_cv <- train(
  as.factor(geo_region_bin) ~ d13C + d15N + d2H + d18O,
  data = CNOH_wide_no_nas,
  method = "lda",
  trControl = train_control
)

lda_cv
```

#### specimens with at least 2 isotopes, imputed based on spatial proximity
```{r}
# install.packages("mice")
library(mice)
CNOH_wide <- 
  CNOH_dat_meta_full_s_ %>%
  select(-mean_value) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = isotope,
    values_from = mean_value_scaled
  ) %>% 
  rename(d13C = normalised_d13c, 
         d15N = normalised_d15n, 
         d2H = normalised_d2h, 
         d18O = normalised_d18o) %>% 
  distinct()

mice_data <- CNOH_wide %>%
  dplyr::select(d13C, d15N, d2H, d18O, geo_region_bin, lon, lat)

mice_imp <- mice(mice_data, m = 5, method = "pmm", seed = 123)  # Predictive mean matching
CNOH_imputed <- complete(mice_imp, 1)  # use first imputed dataset

# run PCA on isotopes
pca <- prcomp(CNOH_imputed[, c("d13C", "d15N", "d2H", "d18O")], scale. = TRUE)

# add PC scores
iso_pca <- cbind(CNOH_imputed, pca$x[, 1:2])

# logistic model on PC axes
m_pca <- glm(geo_region_bin ~ PC1 + PC2, data = iso_pca, family = binomial)
summary(m_pca)

ggplot(iso_pca, aes(PC1, PC2, color = as.factor(geo_region_bin))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(color = "Country (1=AU)")

library(MASS)

# Make geo_region_bin a factor (required by lda)
iso_lda <- CNOH_imputed %>%
  mutate(region = factor(geo_region_bin, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("NZ", "AU")))

# Run LDA
lda_model <- lda(region ~ d13C + d15N + d2H + d18O, data = iso_lda)

# View results
lda_model

# Get predictions
pred <- predict(lda_model)

# Add to dataframe
iso_lda <- iso_lda %>%
  mutate(LD1 = pred$x[, 1],
         predicted = pred$class)

# Confusion matrix
table(Observed = iso_lda$region, Predicted = iso_lda$predicted)

# Classification accuracy
mean(iso_lda$region == iso_lda$predicted)

ggplot(iso_lda, aes(x = LD1, fill = region)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "LDA separation between AU and NZ individuals",
       x = "Linear Discriminant 1", fill = "Region")

ggplot(iso_lda, aes(x = LD1, y = 0, color = region)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0, height = 0.05, size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "LD1", y = NULL, title = "LDA projection")

lda_cv <- lda(region ~ d13C + d15N + d2H + d18O, data = iso_lda, CV = TRUE)

# Accuracy
mean(lda_cv$class == iso_lda$region)

# Confusion matrix
table(Observed = iso_lda$region, Predicted = lda_cv$class)

ggplot(iso_lda %>% mutate(region = factor(region, levels = c("AU", "NZ"))), aes(x = region, y = LD1, color = region)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 4, shape = 23, fill = "white") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("AU" = "#E69F00", "NZ" = "#56B4E9")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("NZ" = "New Zealand",
                              "AU" = "Australia")) +
  labs(y = "Linear discriminant axis 1\n scaled isotopic signature of δ13C, δ15N, δ18O, δ2H",
       x = "collection location in winter")

# Assuming lda_model is already fitted
lda_coeff <- lda_model$scaling[, 1]  # LD1 coefficients
lda_coeff_df <- data.frame(
  isotope = rownames(lda_model$scaling),
  coefficient = lda_coeff
) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(coefficient)))  # order by absolute contribution

ggplot(lda_coeff_df, aes(x = reorder(isotope, coefficient), y = coefficient, fill = coefficient > 0)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.7) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#E69F00", "FALSE" = "#56B4E9"), guide = "none") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Contribution of isotopes to LD1",
    x = "Isotope",
    y = "LD1 coefficient"
  )

# --- LDA model (already fitted) ---
lda_model <- lda(region ~ d13C + d15N + d2H + d18O, data = iso_lda)

# --- LD1 scores ---
lda_pred <- predict(lda_model)
lda_df <- data.frame(CNOH_wide, LD1 = lda_pred$x[, 1])

# --- LD1 density plot ---
p1 <- ggplot(iso_lda, aes(x = LD1, fill = region)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("AU" = "#E69F00", "NZ" = "#56B4E9")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "LDA separation by region",
    x = "LD1",
    y = "Density",
    fill = "Region"
  )

# --- Extract LD1 coefficients (loadings) ---
lda_coeff_df <- data.frame(
  isotope = rownames(lda_model$scaling),
  coefficient = lda_model$scaling[, 1]
) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(coefficient)))

# --- Isotope contribution bar plot ---
p2 <- ggplot(lda_coeff_df, aes(x = reorder(isotope, coefficient), y = coefficient, fill = coefficient > 0)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.7) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#E69F00", "FALSE" = "#56B4E9"), guide = FALSE) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Contribution of isotopes to LD1",
    x = "Isotope",
    y = "LD1 coefficient"
  )

# --- Combine plots with patchwork ---
combined_plot <- p1 / p2 + plot_layout(heights = c(2, 1))
combined_plot

library(caret)

set.seed(123)
train_control <- trainControl(method = "LOOCV")

lda_cv <- train(
  as.factor(geo_region_bin) ~ d13C + d15N + d2H + d18O,
  data = CNOH_imputed,
  method = "lda",
  trControl = train_control
)

lda_cv

```

#### only C and N
#### specimens with at least 2 isotopes, imputed based on spatial proximity
```{r}
# install.packages("mice")
library(mice)

mice_data <- CNOH_wide %>%
  dplyr::select(d13C, d15N, geo_region_bin, lon, lat)

mice_imp <- mice(mice_data, m = 5, method = "pmm", seed = 123)  # Predictive mean matching
CNOH_imputed <- complete(mice_imp, 1)  # use first imputed dataset

# run PCA on isotopes
pca <- prcomp(CNOH_imputed[, c("d13C", "d15N")], scale. = TRUE)

# add PC scores
iso_pca <- cbind(CNOH_imputed, pca$x[, 1:2])

# logistic model on PC axes
m_pca <- glm(geo_region_bin ~ PC1 + PC2, data = iso_pca, family = binomial)
summary(m_pca)

ggplot(iso_pca, aes(PC1, PC2, color = as.factor(geo_region_bin))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(color = "Country (1=AU)")


library(MASS)

# Make geo_region_bin a factor (required by lda)
iso_lda <- CNOH_imputed %>%
  mutate(region = factor(geo_region_bin, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("NZ", "AU")))

# Run LDA
lda_model <- lda(region ~ d13C + d15N, data = iso_lda)

# View results
lda_model

# Get predictions
pred <- predict(lda_model)

# Add to dataframe
iso_lda <- iso_lda %>%
  mutate(LD1 = pred$x[, 1],
         predicted = pred$class)

# Confusion matrix
table(Observed = iso_lda$region, Predicted = iso_lda$predicted)

# Classification accuracy
mean(iso_lda$region == iso_lda$predicted)

ggplot(iso_lda, aes(x = LD1, fill = region)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "LDA separation between AU and NZ individuals",
       x = "Linear Discriminant 1", fill = "Region")

ggplot(iso_lda, aes(x = LD1, y = 0, color = region)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0, height = 0.05, size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "LD1", y = NULL, title = "LDA projection")

lda_cv <- lda(region ~ d13C + d15N, data = iso_lda, CV = TRUE)

# Accuracy
mean(lda_cv$class == iso_lda$region)

# Confusion matrix
table(Observed = iso_lda$region, Predicted = lda_cv$class)

ggplot(iso_lda %>% mutate(region = factor(region, levels = c("AU", "NZ"))), aes(x = region, y = LD1, color = region)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 4, shape = 23, fill = "white") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("AU" = "#E69F00", "NZ" = "#56B4E9")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("NZ" = "New Zealand",
                              "AU" = "Australia")) +
  labs(y = "Linear discriminant axis 1\nIsotopic signature of δ13C, δ15N, δ18O, δ2H",
       x = "collection location in winter")

# Assuming lda_model is already fitted
lda_coeff <- lda_model$scaling[, 1]  # LD1 coefficients
lda_coeff_df <- data.frame(
  isotope = rownames(lda_model$scaling),
  coefficient = lda_coeff
) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(coefficient)))  # order by absolute contribution

ggplot(lda_coeff_df, aes(x = reorder(isotope, coefficient), y = coefficient, fill = coefficient > 0)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.7) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#E69F00", "FALSE" = "#56B4E9"), guide = "none") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Contribution of isotopes to LD1",
    x = "Isotope",
    y = "LD1 coefficient"
  )

# --- LDA model (already fitted) ---
lda_model <- lda(region ~ d13C + d15N, data = iso_lda)

# --- LD1 scores ---
lda_pred <- predict(lda_model)
lda_df <- data.frame(CNOH_wide, LD1 = lda_pred$x[, 1])

# --- LD1 density plot ---
p1 <- ggplot(iso_lda, aes(x = LD1, fill = region)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("AU" = "#E69F00", "NZ" = "#56B4E9")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "LDA separation by region",
    x = "LD1",
    y = "Density",
    fill = "Region"
  )

# --- Extract LD1 coefficients (loadings) ---
lda_coeff_df <- data.frame(
  isotope = rownames(lda_model$scaling),
  coefficient = lda_model$scaling[, 1]
) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(coefficient)))

# --- Isotope contribution bar plot ---
p2 <- ggplot(lda_coeff_df, aes(x = reorder(isotope, coefficient), y = coefficient, fill = coefficient > 0)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.7) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#E69F00", "FALSE" = "#56B4E9"), guide = FALSE) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Contribution of isotopes to LD1",
    x = "Isotope",
    y = "LD1 coefficient"
  )

# --- Combine plots with patchwork ---
combined_plot <- p1 / p2 + plot_layout(heights = c(2, 1))
combined_plot

library(caret)

set.seed(123)
train_control <- trainControl(method = "LOOCV")

lda_cv <- train(
  as.factor(geo_region_bin) ~ d13C + d15N + d2H + d18O,
  data = CNOH_imputed,
  method = "lda",
  trControl = train_control
)

lda_cv

```




```{r}
library(spdep)

coords <- CNOH_wide %>%
  mutate(
    lon_jit = lon + runif(n(), -1e-5, 1e-5),
    lat_jit = lat + runif(n(), -1e-5, 1e-5)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(lon_jit, lat_jit)
nb <- knn2nb(knearneigh(coords, k = 1))  # 3 nearest neighbors
spatial_mean <- sapply(1:nrow(coords), function(i) {
  mean(CNOH_wide$d13C[nb[[i]]], na.rm = TRUE)
})

CNOH_mice$spatial_d13C <- spatial_mean
```

### Linear Discrimanent Analysis


### build isoscapes

currently not enough data for this to work

```{r, eval=FALSE}
library(sf)         # spatial objects
library(gstat)      # geostatistics (kriging, variograms)
library(raster)     # raster operations
library(terra)      # modern replacement for raster
library(spData)     # world basemap (optional)

iso_sf <- 
  CNOH_dat_meta_full %>% 
  mutate(isotope = ifelse(isotope == "normalised_d13c", "d13C",
                           ifelse(isotope == "normalised_d15n", "d15N",
                                  ifelse(isotope == "normalised_d2h", "d2H", "d18O")))) %>% 
  filter(Feather_type == "Breast") %>% filter(Month %in% c("5", "6", "7", "8")) %>% 
  group_by(Specimen_ID, geo_region_bin, isotope, lon, lat) %>%
  summarise(mean_value = mean(mean_value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>% 
  st_as_sf(., coords = c("lon", "lat"), crs = 4326)
iso_sf <- st_transform(iso_sf, 3857)  # Web Mercator
# iso_sf <- 
#   iso_sf %>% 
#   filter(Feather_type == "Breast") %>% filter(Month %in% c("5", "6", "7", "8"))
  

library(ggplot2)
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(patchwork)
library(ggforce)

# your sf object: iso_sf
# columns: isotope, mean_value, geometry (POINTS)

# get basemap
world <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")

# restrict map to Australia + New Zealand region
region_bbox <- st_bbox(c(xmin = 110, xmax = 180, ymin = -55, ymax = -0), crs = st_crs(world))
world_region <- st_crop(world, region_bbox)

# example palettes per isotope
isotope_palettes <- list(
  "d13C" = scale_color_viridis_c(option = "plasma", name = expression(delta^13*C)),
  "d15N" = scale_color_viridis_c(option = "magma", name = expression(delta^15*N)),
  "d2H"  = scale_color_viridis_c(option = "viridis", name = expression(delta^2*H)),
  "d18O" = scale_color_viridis_c(option = "cividis", name = expression(delta^18*O))
)

# spread_points <- function(sf_obj, amount = 0.05) {
#   coords <- st_coordinates(sf_obj)
#   dup_groups <- as.data.frame(coords) %>% 
#     dplyr::mutate(id = seq_len(nrow(.))) %>% 
#     dplyr::group_by(X, Y) %>% 
#     dplyr::mutate(
#       n = n(),
#       angle = seq(0, 2*pi, length.out = n + 1)[1:n],
#       X = X + amount * cos(angle),
#       Y = Y + amount * sin(angle)
#     )
#   sf_obj$geometry <- st_as_sf(dup_groups, coords = c("X", "Y"), crs = st_crs(sf_obj))$geometry
#   sf_obj
# }
# 
# make_iso_plot <- function(iso_name) {
#   iso_data <- iso_sf %>%
#     filter(isotope == iso_name) %>%
#     spread_points(amount = 10)
# 
#   ggplot() +
#     geom_sf(data = world_region, fill = "grey90", color = "white", size = 0.1) +
#     geom_sf(data = iso_data, aes(color = mean_value), size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
#     isotope_palettes[[iso_name]] +
#     coord_sf(xlim = c(110, 180), ylim = c(-55, -20), expand = FALSE) +
#     theme_minimal() +
#     theme(
#       panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey95"),
#       axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
#       plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
#     ) +
#     labs(title = iso_name, x = NULL, y = NULL)
# }

# helper to make per-isotope map
make_iso_plot <- function(iso_name, xlim_, y_lim_) {
  data_ = filter(iso_sf, isotope == iso_name) %>%
    mutate(geometry = st_jitter(geometry, amount = 30000))
  
  ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = world_region, fill = "grey90", color = "white", size = 0.1) +
    geom_sf(
      data = data_,
      aes(color = mean_value),
      size = 2,
      alpha = 0.8
    ) +
    isotope_palettes[[iso_name]] +
    
    # ---- HORIZONTAL COLORBAR INSIDE PLOT ----
    guides(
      color = guide_colorbar(
        direction = "horizontal",
        title.position = "top",
        barwidth = unit(150, "pt"),
        barheight = unit(10, "pt")
      )
    ) +
    luke_theme +
    theme(
      legend.position = c(0.05, 0.05),              # inside panel
      legend.justification = c(0, 0),             # anchor bottom-left
      legend.background = element_blank(),
      legend.key.height = unit(4, "pt"),
      legend.key.width = unit(40, "pt"),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 15),
      
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey95"),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
    ) +
    
    coord_sf(
      xlim = xlim_,
      ylim = y_lim_,
      expand = FALSE
    )
}

# build and combine plots
AU_NZ_plots <- 
  lapply(unique(iso_sf$isotope), function(x) {
  make_iso_plot(iso_name = x, xlim_ = c(135, 180), y_lim_ = c(-50, -35))
})
final_AU_NZ_plot <- wrap_plots(AU_NZ_plots, ncol = 2)
final_AU_NZ_plot

VIC_TAS_plots <- 
  lapply(unique(iso_sf$isotope), function(x) {
  make_iso_plot(iso_name = x, xlim_ = c(140, 150), y_lim_ = c(-45, -35))
})
final_VIC_TAS_plot <- wrap_plots(VIC_TAS_plots, ncol = 2)
final_VIC_TAS_plot

NZ_plots <- 
  lapply(unique(iso_sf$isotope), function(x) {
  make_iso_plot(iso_name = x, xlim_ = c(165, 180), y_lim_ = c(-47, -35))
})
final_NZ_plot <- wrap_plots(NZ_plots, ncol = 2)
final_NZ_plot

# bounding box expanded by ~1 degree
bb <- st_bbox(iso_sf_)
grid <- st_make_grid(
  iso_sf_,
  cellsize = 20000, # grid resolution in meters (~20 km)
  what = "centers"
) %>%
  st_as_sf()

# Convert to sp for gstat
iso_sp <- as(iso_sf_, "Spatial")

# ---------------- δ13C ----------------
# Variogram
vgm_d13c <- variogram(value ~ 1, iso_sp[iso_sp@data$isotope == "normalised_d13c", ])
fit_vgm_d13c <- fit.variogram(vgm_d13c, model = vgm("Sph"))

# Kriging
gstat_d13c <- gstat(id = "d13c", formula = value ~ 1, 
                    data = iso_sp[iso_sp@data$isotope == "normalised_d13c", ], 
                    model = fit_vgm_d13c)

grid_sp <- as(grid, "Spatial")
kriged_d13c <- predict(gstat_d13c, newdata = grid_sp)

# Convert to raster
r_d13c <- rasterFromXYZ(as.data.frame(kriged_d13c)[, c("coords.x1", "coords.x2", "d13c.pred")])
plot(r_d13c, main = "Isoscape: δ13C")
points(iso_sp, pch = 20, col = "black")

# ---------------- δ15N ----------------
# Variogram
vgm_d15n <- variogram(value ~ 1, iso_sp[iso_sp@data$isotope == "normalised_d15n", ])
fit_vgm_d15n <- fit.variogram(vgm_d15n, model = vgm("Sph"))

# Kriging
gstat_d15n <- gstat(id = "d15n", formula = value ~ 1, 
                    data = iso_sp[iso_sp@data$isotope == "normalised_d15n", ], 
                    model = fit_vgm_d15n)

kriged_d15n <- predict(gstat_d15n, newdata = grid_sp)

# Raster
r_d15n <- rasterFromXYZ(as.data.frame(kriged_d15n)[, c("coords.x1", "coords.x2", "d15n.pred")])
plot(r_d15n, main = "Isoscape: δ15N")
points(iso_sp[iso_sp@data$isotope == "normalised_d15n", ], pch = 20, col = "black")

# ---------------- δ18O ----------------
# Variogram
vgm_d18o <- variogram(value ~ 1, iso_sp[iso_sp@data$isotope == "normalised_d18o", ])
fit_vgm_d18o <- fit.variogram(vgm_d18o, model = vgm("Gau"))

# Kriging
gstat_d18o <- gstat(id = "d18o", formula = value ~ 1, 
                    data = iso_sp[iso_sp@data$isotope == "normalised_d18o", ], 
                    model = fit_vgm_d18o)

kriged_d18o <- predict(gstat_d18o, newdata = grid_sp)

# Raster
r_d18o <- rasterFromXYZ(as.data.frame(kriged_d18o)[, c("coords.x1", "coords.x2", "d18o.pred")])
plot(r_d18o, main = "Isoscape: δ18O")
points(iso_sp[iso_sp@data$isotope == "normalised_d18o", ], pch = 20, col = "black")
```

## linear models of spatial variation

```{r}
CNOH_dat_meta_breast_winter <- 
  CNOH_dat_meta_full %>% 
  filter(Feather_type == "Breast") %>% 
  filter(Month %in% c("5", "6", "7", "8"))

# δ13C
mod_d13c <- glm(geo_region_bin ~ mean_value,
                data = subset(CNOH_dat_meta_breast_winter, isotope == "normalised_d13c"),
                family = binomial)

summary(mod_d13c)
anova(mod_d13c, test = "Chisq")

# δ15N
mod_d15n <- glm(geo_region_bin ~ mean_value,
                data = subset(CNOH_dat_meta_breast_winter, isotope == "normalised_d15n"),
                family = binomial)

summary(mod_d15n)
anova(mod_d15n, test = "Chisq")

# δ18O
mod_d18o <- glm(geo_region_bin ~ mean_value,
                data = subset(CNOH_dat_meta_breast_winter, isotope == "normalised_d18o"),
                family = binomial)

summary(mod_d18o)
anova(mod_d18o, test = "Chisq")

# δ2H
mod_d2h <- glm(geo_region_bin ~ mean_value,
                data = subset(CNOH_dat_meta_breast_winter, isotope == "normalised_d2h"),
                family = binomial)

summary(mod_d2h)
anova(mod_d2h, test = "Chisq")
```


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

# --- Prepare single-isotope predicted data ---
predict_iso <- function(mod, data, iso_name){
  pred <- predict(mod, type = "link", se.fit = TRUE)
  data %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(
      linear_pred = pred$fit,
      fit = plogis(pred$fit),
      lower = plogis(pred$fit - 1.96*pred$se.fit),
      upper = plogis(pred$fit + 1.96*pred$se.fit),
      isotope = iso_name
    )
}

# δ13C
d13c_data <- CNOH_dat_meta_breast_winter %>%
  filter(isotope == "normalised_d13c") %>%
  mutate(geo_region_bin = factor(geo_region_bin, levels = c(0,1)))

mod_d13c <- glm(geo_region_bin ~ mean_value, data = d13c_data, family = binomial)
pred_d13c <- predict_iso(mod_d13c, d13c_data, "δ13C")

# δ15N
d15n_data <- CNOH_dat_meta_breast_winter %>%
  filter(isotope == "normalised_d15n") %>%
  mutate(geo_region_bin = factor(geo_region_bin, levels = c(0,1)))

mod_d15n <- glm(geo_region_bin ~ mean_value, data = d15n_data, family = binomial)
pred_d15n <- predict_iso(mod_d15n, d15n_data, "δ15N")

# δ18O
d18o_data <- CNOH_dat_meta_breast_winter %>%
  filter(isotope == "normalised_d18o") %>%
  mutate(geo_region_bin = factor(geo_region_bin, levels = c(0,1)))

mod_d18o <- glm(geo_region_bin ~ mean_value, data = d18o_data, family = binomial)
pred_d18o <- predict_iso(mod_d18o, d18o_data, "δ18O")

# δ2H
d2h_data <- CNOH_dat_meta_breast_winter %>%
  filter(isotope == "normalised_d2h") %>%
  mutate(geo_region_bin = factor(geo_region_bin, levels = c(0,1)))

mod_d2h <- glm(geo_region_bin ~ mean_value, data = d2h_data, family = binomial)
pred_d2h <- predict_iso(mod_d2h, d2h_data, "δ2H")

# --- Prepare multi-isotope model ---
iso_wide <- CNOH_dat_meta_breast_winter %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = c("Specimen_ID","geo_region_bin"),
              names_from = "isotope",
              values_from = "mean_value") %>%
  filter(!is.na(normalised_d13c) & !is.na(normalised_d15n) & !is.na(normalised_d18o) & !is.na(normalised_d2h)) %>%
  mutate(geo_region_bin = factor(geo_region_bin, levels = c(0,1))) %>%
  ungroup()

mod_multi <- glm(geo_region_bin ~ normalised_d13c + normalised_d15n + normalised_d18o + normalised_d2h,
                 data = iso_wide, family = binomial)

pred_multi <- predict(mod_multi, type = "link", se.fit = TRUE)

iso_wide_pred <- iso_wide %>%
  mutate(
    linear_pred = pred_multi$fit,
    fit = plogis(pred_multi$fit),
    lower = plogis(pred_multi$fit - 1.96*pred_multi$se.fit),
    upper = plogis(pred_multi$fit + 1.96*pred_multi$se.fit),
    isotope = "multi-isotope"
  )

# --- Combine all predicted data ---
pred_all <- bind_rows(
  pred_d13c %>% dplyr::select(mean_value, fit, lower, upper, isotope),
  pred_d15n %>% dplyr::select(mean_value, fit, lower, upper, isotope),
  pred_d18o %>% dplyr::select(mean_value, fit, lower, upper, isotope),
  pred_d2h %>% dplyr::select(mean_value, fit, lower, upper, isotope)#,
  # iso_wide_pred %>% dplyr::select(linear_pred, fit, lower, upper, isotope) %>%
    # rename(mean_value = linear_pred)
)

# Combine raw data points for plotting
raw_all <- bind_rows(
  d13c_data %>% dplyr::select(mean_value, geo_region_bin) %>% mutate(isotope = "δ13C"),
  d15n_data %>% dplyr::select(mean_value, geo_region_bin) %>% mutate(isotope = "δ15N"),
  d18o_data %>% dplyr::select(mean_value, geo_region_bin) %>% mutate(isotope = "δ18O"),
  d2h_data %>% dplyr::select(mean_value, geo_region_bin) %>% mutate(isotope = "δ2H")#,
  # iso_wide_pred %>% dplyr::select(linear_pred, geo_region_bin) %>% mutate(isotope = "multi-isotope") %>%
    # rename(mean_value = linear_pred)
)

# Thresholds for plotting
thresholds <- data.frame(
  isotope = c("δ13C","δ15N","δ18O","δ2H"), #,"multi-isotope"),
  threshold = c(0.475, 0.366, 0.282, 0.59)
)

# --- Plot ---
ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = raw_all, aes(x = mean_value, y = as.numeric(geo_region_bin)-1),
             position = position_jitter(height = 0.05), alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_line(data = pred_all, aes(x = mean_value, y = fit), color = "steelblue", size = 1) +
  geom_ribbon(data = pred_all, aes(x = mean_value, ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
              fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_hline(data = thresholds, aes(yintercept = threshold), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  facet_wrap(~isotope, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(x = "Stable isotope value",
       y = "Probability wintering in Australia",
       title = "Predicted effects of single-isotope models on wintering region") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
CNOH_dat_meta_breast_winter_wide <- tidyr::pivot_wider(
  CNOH_dat_meta_breast_winter,
  id_cols = c(Specimen_ID, geo_region_bin),
  names_from = isotope,
  values_from = mean_value
)

mod_multi <- glm(geo_region_bin ~ normalised_d13c + normalised_d15n + normalised_d18o,
                 data = CNOH_dat_meta_breast_winter_wide,
                 family = binomial)

summary(mod_multi)
anova(mod_multi, test = "Chisq")
```

```{r}
library(pscl)
pR2(mod_d13c)   # univariate R2
pR2(mod_d15n)
pR2(mod_d18o)
pR2(mod_multi)  # multivariate R2

```

## bootstrap ROC analysis
```{r}
install.packages("caret")
install.packages("pROC")
library(caret)
library(pROC)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
```


```{r, eval=FALSE}
set.seed(123)
n_runs <- 1000
isotopes <- c("normalised_d13c", "normalised_d15n", "normalised_d18o")

all_iso_results <- list()
threshold_results <- data.frame()

ctrl <- trainControl(
  method = "cv",
  number = 5,
  classProbs = TRUE,
  summaryFunction = twoClassSummary,
  savePredictions = "final"
)

for(run in 1:n_runs){
  
  # --- Single-isotope models ---
  for(iso in isotopes){
    iso_data <- subset(CNOH_dat_meta_breast_winter, isotope == iso)
    iso_data$geo_region_bin <- factor(iso_data$geo_region_bin, levels = c(0,1), labels = c("NZ","AU"))
    
    cv_mod <- train(
      geo_region_bin ~ mean_value,
      data = iso_data,
      method = "glm",
      family = binomial,
      trControl = ctrl,
      metric = "ROC"
    )
    
    pred <- cv_mod$pred$NZ
    roc_obj <- roc(cv_mod$pred$obs, pred, levels = c("AU","NZ"))
    
    roc_df <- coords(roc_obj, "all", ret = c("specificity","sensitivity"))
    roc_df <- as.data.frame(roc_df) %>% mutate(model = iso, run = run)
    all_iso_results[[length(all_iso_results)+1]] <- roc_df
    
    opt <- coords(roc_obj, "best", ret = c("threshold","sensitivity","specificity"), best.method = "youden")
    threshold_results <- rbind(threshold_results,
                               data.frame(run = run, model = iso,
                                          threshold = opt["threshold"],
                                          sensitivity = opt["sensitivity"],
                                          specificity = opt["specificity"]))
  }
  
  # --- Multi-isotope model ---
  iso_wide <- tidyr::pivot_wider(
    CNOH_dat_meta_breast_winter,
    id_cols = c("Specimen_ID","geo_region_bin"),
    names_from = "isotope",
    values_from = "mean_value"
  ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(normalised_d13c) & !is.na(normalised_d15n) & !is.na(normalised_d18o))
  
  iso_wide$geo_region_bin <- factor(iso_wide$geo_region_bin, levels = c(0,1), labels = c("NZ","AU"))
  
  cv_multi <- train(
    geo_region_bin ~ normalised_d13c + normalised_d15n + normalised_d18o,
    data = iso_wide,
    method = "glm",
    family = binomial,
    trControl = ctrl,
    metric = "ROC"
  )
  
  pred_multi <- cv_multi$pred$NZ
  roc_multi <- roc(cv_multi$pred$obs, pred_multi, levels = c("AU","NZ"))
  
  roc_df_multi <- coords(roc_multi, "all", ret = c("specificity","sensitivity"))
  roc_df_multi <- as.data.frame(roc_df_multi) %>% mutate(model = "multi_isotope", run = run)
  all_iso_results[[length(all_iso_results)+1]] <- roc_df_multi
  
  opt_multi <- coords(roc_multi, "best", ret = c("threshold","sensitivity","specificity"), best.method = "youden")
  threshold_results <- rbind(threshold_results,
                             data.frame(run = run, model = "multi_isotope",
                                        threshold = opt_multi["threshold"],
                                        sensitivity = opt_multi["sensitivity"],
                                        specificity = opt_multi["specificity"]))
}

# Combine ROC data
roc_all <- list(iso_results = bind_rows(all_iso_results),
                threshold_results = threshold_results)

saveRDS(roc_all, "output/roc_all.rds")
```


```{r}
roc_all <- readRDS("output/roc_all.rds")

# Compute mean ROC for each model
roc_mean <- roc_all$iso_results %>%
  group_by(model, specificity) %>%
  summarise(sensitivity_mean = mean(sensitivity), .groups = "drop")

# Summarize optimal thresholds with mean and 95% CI
threshold_summary <- roc_all$threshold_results %>%
  group_by(model) %>%
  summarise(
    threshold_mean = mean(threshold),
    threshold_lower = quantile(threshold, 0.025),
    threshold_upper = quantile(threshold, 0.975),
    sensitivity_mean = mean(sensitivity),
    sensitivity_lower = quantile(sensitivity, 0.025),
    sensitivity_upper = quantile(sensitivity, 0.975),
    specificity_mean = mean(specificity),
    specificity_lower = quantile(specificity, 0.025),
    specificity_upper = quantile(specificity, 0.975)
  )

# Convert threshold values to a nicely formatted string
threshold_summary <- threshold_summary %>%
  mutate(threshold_label = sprintf("%.2f", threshold_mean))

threshold_summary

# Plot ROC curves with faint lines + mean curve + diagonal + mean optimal threshold points + labels + 95% CI
ggplot() +
  geom_line(data = roc_all$iso_results %>% group_by(model, run, sensitivity), aes(x = 1 - specificity, y = sensitivity, group = run),
            alpha = 0.1, color = "lightsteelblue") +
  geom_line(data = roc_mean, aes(x = 1 - specificity, y = sensitivity_mean),
            color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
  geom_point(data = threshold_summary, 
             aes(x = 1 - specificity_mean, y = sensitivity_mean),
             color = "black", size = 3) +
  # geom_errorbar(data = threshold_summary,
  #               aes(x = 1 - specificity_mean, ymin = sensitivity_lower, ymax = sensitivity_upper),
  #               color = "black", width = 0.01) +
  # geom_errorbarh(data = threshold_summary,
  #                aes(y = sensitivity_mean, xmin = 1 - specificity_upper, xmax = 1 - specificity_lower),
  #                color = "black", height = 0.01) +
  geom_text(data = threshold_summary,
            aes(x = 1 - specificity_mean, y = sensitivity_mean, label = threshold_label),
            vjust = -1, hjust = 1.1, color = "black", size = 3) +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  facet_wrap(~model) +
  labs(x = "False Positive Rate (1 - Specificity)", 
       y = "True Positive Rate (Sensitivity)",
       title = "Bootstrap CV ROC curves (1000 runs) with Mean ROC, Optimal Thresholds, and 95% CI") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Overview

The table summarizes the predictive performance of logistic regression models classifying samples into `geo_region` (NZ vs AU) based on stable isotope values (δ¹³C, δ¹⁵N, δ¹⁸O) and a combined multi-isotope model. For each model, the **mean optimal threshold** (based on Youden’s index) is reported, along with **95% confidence intervals** for threshold, sensitivity, and specificity across 1000 bootstrap cross-validation runs.

## Key Observations

### Multi-isotope model

-   **Mean optimal threshold:** 0.59 (95% CI: 0.29–0.999)\
-   **Sensitivity (true positive rate for AU):** 0.76 (CI: 0.50–0.83)\
-   **Specificity (true negative rate for NZ):** 0.73 (CI: 0.50–1)

**Interpretation:** Combining δ¹³C, δ¹⁵N, and δ¹⁸O provides moderately balanced performance, with some uncertainty due to small sample size, but achieves reasonably high sensitivity and specificity simultaneously.

### δ¹³C (`normalised_d13c`)

-   **Mean threshold:** 0.475 (CI: 0.418–0.554)\
-   **Sensitivity (AU correctly identified):** 0.78 (CI: 0.778–0.778)\
-   **Specificity (NZ correctly identified):** 0.915 (CI: 0.824–0.941)

**Interpretation:** δ¹³C alone is highly specific—good at correctly identifying NZ samples—but slightly less sensitive in detecting AU samples. Narrow CI suggests consistent performance across bootstrap runs.\
- **Context:** ROC = 0.93 → excellent discriminative ability of δ¹³C for separating NZ vs AU samples. Sensitivity = 0.78 → the model correctly identifies 78% of AU samples. Specificity = 0.915 → the model correctly identifies 91.5% of NZ samples.

### δ¹⁵N (`normalised_d15n`)

-   **Mean threshold:** 0.366 (CI: 0.256–0.441)\
-   **Sensitivity (AU correctly identified):** 0.68 (CI: 0.556–0.889)\
-   **Specificity (NZ correctly identified):** 0.78 (CI: 0.529–0.882)

**Interpretation:** δ¹⁵N provides moderate predictive power, with both sensitivity and specificity lower than δ¹³C and wider CI, reflecting higher uncertainty in classification.

### δ¹⁸O (`normalised_d18o`)

-   **Mean threshold:** 0.282 (CI: 0.201–0.353)\
-   **Sensitivity (AU correctly identified):** 0.86 (CI: 0.857–0.857)\
-   **Specificity (NZ correctly identified):** 0.71 (CI: 0.647–0.765)

**Interpretation:** δ¹⁸O is highly sensitive (good at detecting AU samples) but less specific (more false positives for NZ), with relatively narrow CI.

## General Interpretation

-   **δ¹³C** shows the best overall specificity (strong at identifying NZ samples).\
-   **δ¹⁸O** shows the best sensitivity (strong at identifying AU samples).\
-   The **multi-isotope model** balances sensitivity and specificity, leveraging complementary information from all three isotopes.\
-   Confidence intervals highlight **uncertainty due to small sample size**, but the bootstrap approach provides robust estimates of model performance and optimal thresholds.

**Summary:** Among the single isotopes, **δ¹³C is the best predictor** for geographic origin, providing the highest discriminative ability between NZ and AU samples. The sensitivity and specificity values indicate that the models are able to correctly classify a high proportion of both regions, with δ¹³C correctly identifying ~78% of AU samples and ~91% of NZ samples at the mean optimal threshold.

### C and N data from live birds
```{r}
sfc_as_cols <- function(x, geometry, names = c("x", "y")) {
  if (missing(geometry)) {
    geometry <- sf::st_geometry(x)
  } else {
    geometry <- rlang::eval_tidy(enquo(geometry), x)
  }
  
  stopifnot(inherits(x, "sf"), inherits(geometry, "sfc_POINT"))
  
  coords <- sf::st_coordinates(geometry)
  coords_df <- tibble::as_tibble(coords)
  
  stopifnot(length(names) == ncol(coords_df))
  
  x <- x[, !names(x) %in% names]
  coords_df <- setNames(coords_df, names)
  
  dplyr::bind_cols(x, coords_df)
}

bdot_phenotypes <- 
  read_excel(path = "/Users/luketheduke2/ownCloud/kemp_projects/bdot/R_projects/bdot_stable_isotopes/data/LIMS_251105_MaxPlanck_Eberhart-Hertel.xlsx",
             sheet = "Sample Submission Form", skip = 3,
             # range = cell_cols("A:Z"),
             col_names = TRUE) %>%
  select(`Sample Identifier`, TagID, Sex, `Individual Leg Markings`, `Migratory Status`, 
         `Date Sampled`, `Longitude Sampled`, `Latitude Sampled`, `Migratory Status Comment`) %>% 
  mutate(tag_id = ifelse(
    TagID == "266470" & as.Date(`Date Sampled`) < as.Date("2024-12-09"),
    "266470_A",
    ifelse(
      TagID == "266470" & as.Date(`Date Sampled`) >= as.Date("2024-12-09"),
      "266470_B",
      TagID
    )
  )) %>% 
  select(-c(TagID, `Date Sampled`)) %>% 
  rename(status = `Migratory Status`,
         latitude_cap = `Latitude Sampled`,
         longitude_cap = `Longitude Sampled`,
         comment = `Migratory Status Comment`,
         sex = Sex,
         mark = `Individual Leg Markings`,
         ring = `Sample Identifier`) %>% 
  mutate(ring = stringr::str_extract(ring, "^[^_]+")) %>% distinct()

live_bdot_data <-
  # read_excel(here("data/RAW DATA_SI_Feathers_LEH_Nov25.xls"), 
  #            sheet = "RAW_sample data",
  #            col_types = "text", skip = 9, col_names = TRUE) %>%
  read_excel(here("data/Master_EA_C_N_SI_Batch 5 Breast and Primary Feathers_LEH_Repeats added_April25_v1_SB_v2.xls"),
             sheet = "Sample results_C&N",
             col_types = "text", skip = 10, col_names = TRUE) %>%
    rename_with(~ .x %>%
                tolower() %>%
                str_replace_all(" ", "_") %>%
                str_replace_all("__", "_") %>%
                str_replace_all("___", "_") %>%
                str_replace_all("%", "_perc_") %>%
                str_replace_all(":", "") %>%
                str_replace_all("#", "")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(corrected_identifer_1, `amount_(mg)`, normalised_d15n, 
                normalised_d13c, cn_mass_ratio) %>% 
  rename(d15N = normalised_d15n,
         d13C = normalised_d13c,
         sample = `corrected_identifer_1`,
         amount = `amount_(mg)`) %>% 
  mutate(
    feather_type = str_extract(sample, regex("primary|breast|pimary", ignore_case = TRUE)),
    ring  = str_extract(sample, "^[^_]+")
  ) %>%
    # filter(ring != "CP19311") %>% 
  mutate(feather_type = ifelse(feather_type == "pimary", "primary", feather_type)) %>% 
  dplyr::select(ring, sample, feather_type, amount, d15N, d13C) %>% 
  mutate(amount = as.numeric(amount), 
         d15N = as.numeric(d15N), 
         d13C = as.numeric(d13C),
         d15N_scaled = as.numeric(scale(d15N)),
         d13C_scaled = as.numeric(scale(d13C))) %>%
  arrange(ring, feather_type) %>%
  # select(ring, feather_type, d15N, d13C) %>%
  # pivot_wider(
  #   names_from  = feather_type,
  #   values_from = c(d15N, d13C),
  #   names_glue  = "{.value}_{feather_type}"
  # ) %>% 
  left_join(., bdot_phenotypes, by = "ring") %>%
  mutate(status_bin = ifelse(str_detect(status, "migrant"), "migrant", status) %>% as.factor()) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ring)) %>% 
  filter(status != "unknown")
  #   na.omit() %>% 
  #   mutate(d15N_diff = abs(d15N_primary - d15N_breast),
  #          d13C_diff = abs(d13C_primary - d13C_breast)) %>% 
  # pivot_longer(
  #   cols = c(d15N_diff, d13C_diff),
  #   names_to = "isotope_diff",
  #   values_to = "value"
  # ) %>%
  # group_by(isotope_diff) %>%
  # mutate(value_scaled = as.numeric(scale(value))) %>%
  # ungroup() %>% 
  # left_join(., bdot_phenotypes, by = "ring") %>% 
  # mutate(status_bin = ifelse(str_detect(status, "migrant"), "migrant", status) %>% as.factor()) #%>% 
  # filter(status != "unknown")
bdot_argos_proc_2024 <- readRDS(file = "/Users/luketheduke2/ownCloud/kemp_projects/bdot/R_projects/bdot_db/output/bdot_argos_proc_2024_lonE.rds")

# Make midpoint the geometry and set it active
st_geometry(bdot_argos_proc_2024$ctdf) <- "midpoint"
library(geosphere)
bdot_winter_sites_2024_max_dist <- 
  bdot_argos_proc_2024$ctdf %>% 
  st_transform(4326) %>% 
  sfc_as_cols(names = c("longitude", "latitude")) %>% 
  rename(tag_id = id) %>% 
  # left_join(., bdot_phenotypes, by = "tag_id") %>% 
  st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  select(-chull) %>%
  mutate(status = ifelse(tag_id %in% c("266388", "266451"), "resident", status),
         longitude_cap = ifelse(tag_id == "266388", 172.6316, 
                                ifelse(tag_id == "266388", 172.6795, longitude_cap)),
         latitude_cap = ifelse(tag_id == "266388", -43.82988, 
                                ifelse(tag_id == "266388", -43.82687, latitude_cap))) %>% 
  mutate(distance_km = distHaversine(
    cbind(longitude, latitude),
    cbind(longitude_cap, latitude_cap)
  ) / 1000) %>% 
  group_by(tag_id) %>% 
  arrange(desc(distance_km)) %>% 
  slice(1) %>% 
  ungroup

bdot_winter_sites_2024_max_dist %>% 
  filter(status != "unknown") %>% 
  arrange(status)

live_bdot_data %>% 
  left_join(., 
            bdot_winter_sites_2024_max_dist %>% 
              select(ring, longitude, latitude, distance_km), 
            by = "ring") %>% 
  rename(longitude_winter = longitude, 
         latitude_winter = latitude,
         longitude_breed = longitude_cap,
         latitude_breed = latitude_cap) %>% 
  arrange(ring, feather_type) %>% 
  select(ring, feather_type, d15N, d13C, d15N_scaled, d13C_scaled, sex, status, 
         status_bin, longitude_breed, latitude_breed)#, longitude_winter, latitude_winter)

### Exploratory plot ----
ggplot() + 
  geom_line(data = live_bdot_data,
             aes(x = d13C_scaled, y = d15N_scaled, 
                 color = status, group = ring), 
             size = 0.5, alpha = 0.5) + 
  geom_point(data = live_bdot_data,
             aes(x = d13C_scaled, y = d15N_scaled, 
                 color = status, shape = feather_type), 
             size = 3) + 
  labs(x = expression(delta^{13}*C[scaled]), 
       y = expression(delta^{15}*N[scaled]), 
       shape = "Feather",
       color = "Status") + 
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  theme(legend.position = "right", legend.title = element_blank(),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 15)) +
  facet_wrap(status ~ ., nrow = 2, ncol = 2)

df_dist <- 
  live_bdot_data %>%
  group_by(ring, status) %>%
  filter(n() == 2) %>%              # keep only groups with 2 points
  summarise(
    distance = sqrt((d15N_scaled[2] - d15N_scaled[1])^2 + (d13C_scaled[2] - d13C_scaled[1])^2)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  left_join(., bdot_winter_sites_2024_max_dist %>% select(ring, distance_km), by = "ring")

ggplot(data = df_dist) +
  geom_point(aes(x = distance, y = distance_km)) +
  geom_smooth(aes(x = distance, y = distance_km), method = "lm") +
  luke_theme +
  xlab("Eucledian distance in scaled N & C space") +
  ylab("Geographic distance between\nbreeding and wintering site (km)")

hist(df_dist$distance)

m1 <- aov(distance ~ status, data = df_dist)
summary(m1)
  
# Primaries
# 17 AU migrants, 22 residents, X unknown, 7 NI migrants, 10 SI migrants
live_bdot_data %>% 
  group_by(status) %>% summarise(n_birds = n_distinct(ring))

# 56 birds
live_bdot_data %>% 
  summarise(n_birds = n_distinct(ring))

# 55 birds with both feathers analyzed
live_bdot_data %>% 
  group_by(ring) %>% summarise(n_feathers = n_distinct(feather_type)) %>% 
  pull(n_feathers) %>% table()

live_bdot_data %>% 
  filter(!is.na(d15N) & !is.na(d13C)) %>% 
  group_by(feather_type) %>% summarise(n_birds = n_distinct(ring))

# Breast
# 11 AU migrants, 13 residents, 13 unknown, 5 NI migrants, 3 SI migrants
live_bdot_data %>% 
  filter(!is.na(d15N_breast) & !is.na(d13C_breast)) %>% 
  group_by(status) %>% summarise(n_birds = n_distinct(ring))

AUmig_res_primary <- 
  live_bdot_data %>% 
  filter(!is.na(d15N_primary) & !is.na(d13C_primary))
  
C_live_mod1 <- 
  glm(status_bin ~ value_scaled, 
       data = live_bdot_data %>% 
        filter(isotope_diff == "d13C_diff"), 
      family = binomial)

N_live_mod1 <- 
  glm(status_bin ~ value_scaled, 
       data = live_bdot_data %>% 
        filter(isotope_diff == "d15N_diff"), 
      family = binomial)

summary(C_live_mod1)
summary(N_live_mod1)

# 1️⃣ Create new data for prediction
newdataN <- 
  live_bdot_data %>% 
  filter(isotope_diff == "d15N_diff") %>% 
  reframe(
    value_scaled = seq(min(value_scaled), max(value_scaled), length.out = 50)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

newdataC <- 
  live_bdot_data %>% 
  filter(isotope_diff == "d13C_diff") %>% 
  reframe(
    value_scaled = seq(min(value_scaled), max(value_scaled), length.out = 50)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# 2️⃣ Predict probabilities AND standard errors for CI
predC <- predict(C_live_mod1, newdataC, type = "link", se.fit = TRUE)
predN <- predict(N_live_mod1, newdataN, type = "link", se.fit = TRUE)

# Calculate predicted probability and 95% CI
newdataC <- newdataC %>%
  mutate(
    fit_link = predC$fit,
    se_link = predC$se.fit,
    # logistic transformation
    pred_prob = plogis(fit_link),
    lower = plogis(fit_link - 1.96 * se_link),
    upper = plogis(fit_link + 1.96 * se_link)
  )

newdataN <- newdataN %>%
  mutate(
    fit_link = predN$fit,
    se_link = predN$se.fit,
    # logistic transformation
    pred_prob = plogis(fit_link),
    lower = plogis(fit_link - 1.96 * se_link),
    upper = plogis(fit_link + 1.96 * se_link)
  )

# 3️⃣ Plot raw data + predicted probability + confidence intervals
ggplot() +
  # raw data
  geom_jitter(data = live_bdot_data %>% filter(isotope_diff == "d15N_diff"), 
              aes(x = value_scaled, y = status_bin, color = isotope_diff), 
              width = 0.1, height = 0.02, alpha = 0.6) +
  # predicted probability curves
  geom_line(data = newdataN, aes(x = value_scaled, y = pred_prob), size = 1.2) +
  # confidence interval ribbons
  geom_ribbon(data = newdataN, aes(x = value_scaled, ymin = lower, ymax = upper), 
              alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Scaled difference in d13N",
    y = "Probability of having migrated"
  )
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

# --- Prepare single-isotope predicted data ---
predict_iso <- function(mod, data, iso_name){
  pred <- predict(mod, se.fit = TRUE)
  data %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(
      linear_pred = pred$fit,
      fit = plogis(pred$fit),
      lower = plogis(pred$fit - 1.96*pred$se.fit),
      upper = plogis(pred$fit + 1.96*pred$se.fit),
      isotope = iso_name
    )
}

ggplot(data = live_bdot_data) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x = status_bin, y = d15N, color = feather_type))

ggplot(data = live_bdot_data) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x = status_bin, y = d13C, color = feather_type))

# δ13C
mod_d13C <- lm(d13C_scaled ~ status_bin, data = live_bdot_data)
pred_d13C <- predict_iso(mod_d13C, live_bdot_data, "δ13C")

# δ15N
mod_d15N <- lm(d15N_scaled ~ status_bin, data = live_bdot_data)
pred_d15N <- predict_iso(mod_d15N, live_bdot_data, "δ15N")

pred_all <- bind_rows(
  pred_d13C %>% dplyr::select(d13C_scaled, fit, lower, upper, isotope) %>% rename(mean_value = d13C_scaled),
  pred_d15N %>% dplyr::select(d15N_scaled, fit, lower, upper, isotope) %>% rename(mean_value = d15N_scaled)
)

# # δ15N + δ13C
# mod_multi <- glm(geo_region_bin ~ d13C + d15N,
#                  data = iso_wide, family = binomial)
# 
# pred_multi <- predict(mod_multi, type = "link", se.fit = TRUE)
# 
# iso_wide_pred <- iso_wide %>%
#   mutate(
#     linear_pred = pred_multi$fit,
#     fit = plogis(pred_multi$fit),
#     lower = plogis(pred_multi$fit - 1.96*pred_multi$se.fit),
#     upper = plogis(pred_multi$fit + 1.96*pred_multi$se.fit),
#     isotope = "multi-isotope"
#   )

# --- Combine all predicted data ---
# pred_all <- bind_rows(
#   pred_d13c %>% dplyr::select(mean_value, fit, lower, upper, isotope),
#   pred_d15n %>% dplyr::select(mean_value, fit, lower, upper, isotope),
#   pred_d18o %>% dplyr::select(mean_value, fit, lower, upper, isotope),
#   pred_d2h %>% dplyr::select(mean_value, fit, lower, upper, isotope)#,
#   # iso_wide_pred %>% dplyr::select(linear_pred, fit, lower, upper, isotope) %>%
#     # rename(mean_value = linear_pred)
# )

# Combine raw data points for plotting
raw_all <- bind_rows(
  live_bdot_data %>% dplyr::select(d13C_scaled, status_bin) %>% mutate(isotope = "δ13C") %>% rename(mean_value = d13C_scaled),
  live_bdot_data %>% dplyr::select(d15N_scaled, status_bin) %>% mutate(isotope = "δ15N") %>% rename(mean_value = d15N_scaled)#,
  # d18o_data %>% dplyr::select(mean_value, geo_region_bin) %>% mutate(isotope = "δ18O"),
  # d2h_data %>% dplyr::select(mean_value, geo_region_bin) %>% mutate(isotope = "δ2H")#,
  # iso_wide_pred %>% dplyr::select(linear_pred, geo_region_bin) %>% mutate(isotope = "multi-isotope") %>%
    # rename(mean_value = linear_pred)
)

# Thresholds for plotting
thresholds <- data.frame(
  isotope = c("δ13C","δ15N","δ18O","δ2H"), #,"multi-isotope"),
  threshold = c(0.475, 0.366, 0.282, 0.59)
)

# --- Plot ---
ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = raw_all, aes(x = mean_value, y = as.numeric(status_bin)-1),
             position = position_jitter(height = 0.05), alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_line(data = pred_all, aes(x = mean_value, y = fit), color = "steelblue", size = 1) +
  geom_ribbon(data = pred_all, aes(x = mean_value, ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
              fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.2) +
  # geom_hline(data = thresholds, aes(yintercept = threshold), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  facet_wrap(~isotope, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(x = "Stable isotope value",
       y = "Probability wintering in Australia",
       title = "Predicted effects of single-isotope models on wintering region") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
# Required packages
packages <- c("tidyverse","tidymodels","caret","lme4","brms","MASS","randomForest","pROC","patchwork","rsample","vip")
invisible(lapply(packages, function(p) if(!requireNamespace(p, quietly=TRUE)) install.packages(p)))
library(tidyverse); library(tidymodels); library(caret); library(lme4); library(brms)
library(MASS); library(randomForest); library(pROC); library(patchwork); library(rsample); library(vip)
library(DBI); library(dbo); library(elevatr); library(gghalves)
library(dbo)
library(elevatr)
con = dbcon(db = "FIELD_2024_BADOatNZ")

df <- 
  live_bdot_data %>% 
  left_join(., 
            bdot_winter_sites_2024_max_dist %>% 
              select(ring, longitude, latitude, distance_km), 
            by = "ring") %>% 
  rename(longitude_winter = longitude, 
         latitude_winter = latitude,
         longitude_breed = longitude_cap,
         latitude_breed = latitude_cap) %>% 
  arrange(ring, feather_type) %>% 
  select(ring, feather_type, d15N, d13C, d15N_scaled, d13C_scaled, sex, status, 
         status_bin, longitude_breed, latitude_breed) %>% 
  left_join(., dbq(con, "SELECT * FROM CAPTURES") %>% select(ring, site) %>% distinct()) %>% 
  group_by(ring) %>% 
  mutate(n_tissues = n_distinct(feather_type)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  mutate(x_line = ifelse(feather_type == "primary", 1 + 0.15,
                         ifelse(feather_type == "breast", 
                                2 - 0.15, NA)),
         x_point = ifelse(feather_type == "primary", 1, 
                          ifelse(feather_type == "breast", 
                                 2, NA)),
         x_box = ifelse(feather_type == "primary", 1 - 0.15, 
                          ifelse(feather_type == "breast", 
                                 2 + 0.15, NA))) %>% 
  mutate(status = factor(status, levels = c("resident", "SI migrant", "NI migrant", "AU migrant"))) %>% 
  mutate(site_name = case_when(
      site == "KT" ~ "Kaitorete Spit",
      site == "TS" ~ "Tasman River",
      site == "KP" ~ "Kena Peninsula",
      site == "MS" ~ "Motueka Spit",
      site == "KK" ~ "Kaikoura",
      site == "CR" ~ "Cass River",
      site == "TA" ~ "Upukeroa River",
      site == "TP" ~ "Tiwai Point",
      site == "CH" ~ "Chathams",
      site == "HC" ~ "Napier",
      site == "OM" ~ "Old Man Range",
      site == "PR" ~ "Pisa Range",
      site == "PB" ~ "Porters Beach, Abel Tasman National Park",
      site == "TO" ~ "Rangipo Desert",
      site == "MC" ~ "Macaulay River",
      site == "MB" ~ "Maryburn",
      site == "OD" ~ "Ohau Downs",
      site == "TR" ~ "Tekapo River",
      site == "MA" ~ "Miranda Rescue",
      site == "PW" ~ "Port Waikato",
      TRUE ~ site
    ))

status_facets <- c('SI migrant' = "South Island migrant", 
                   'NI migrant' = "North Island migrant", 
                   'AU migrant' = "Australia migrant", 
                   'resident' = "Resident")

# Step 1: Convert to sf object
points_sf <- st_as_sf(df, coords = c("longitude_breed", "latitude_breed"), crs = 4326)

# Step 2: Get elevation (units: meters)
elevations <- get_elev_point(locations = points_sf, units = "meters", src = "aws")

# Step 3: Add elevation to original data
df <- 
  bind_cols(df, elevation = elevations$elevation) %>% 
  mutate(elevation = ifelse(elevation < 0, 0, elevation))

df_wide <- df %>% 
  select(ring, feather_type, d15N, elevation, status) %>% 
  group_by(ring, elevation, status, feather_type) %>% 
  summarise(d15N = mean(d15N, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = feather_type,
    values_from = d15N
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    d15N_diff = primary - breast
  ) %>% 
  drop_na(d15N_diff)# %>% 
  # filter(status %in% c("AU migrant", "NI migrant"))

mod <- lm(d15N_diff ~ elevation, data = df_wide)
summary(mod)

newdat <- expand.grid(
  elevation = seq(min(df_wide$elevation), max(df_wide$elevation), length.out = 100),
  status = unique(df_wide$status)
)

pred <- predict(mod, newdata = newdat, interval = "confidence")
newdat$fit <- pred[, "fit"]
newdat$lwr <- pred[, "lwr"]
newdat$upr <- pred[, "upr"]

ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = df_wide,
             aes(x = elevation, y = d15N_diff),
             alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_ribbon(data = newdat,
              aes(x = elevation, ymin = lwr, ymax = upr),
              alpha = 0.25, colour = NA) +
  geom_line(data = newdat,
            aes(x = elevation, y = fit),
            size = 1.2) +
  labs(
    x = "Elevation",
    y = "Difference in d15N (primary – breast)",
    color = "Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)# +
  # facet_grid(.~status)

# ---------------------------
# 0. Basic data assumptions
# ---------------------------
# Input: one row per feather (like your sample). Columns required:
# ring (unique bird id), feather_type (e.g., "primary" or "breast"),
# d15N, d13C, sex, status (resident/migrant), longitude_breed, latitude_breed
# If you have scaled values already, you can use them (d15N_scaled etc.) or compute within pipeline.

# Example: df <- read_csv("your_data.csv")
# I'll assume df exists.

# ---------------------------
# 1. Reshape to one-row-per-bird
# ---------------------------
# We need paired samples per bird (primary = breeding feather, breast = winter feather).
# If some birds miss one feather, we can decide to keep them later (but paired data is best).

df_wide <- df %>%
  group_by(site, ring, sex, status, longitude_breed, latitude_breed, elevation, feather_type) %>%
  summarise(
    d15N = mean(d15N, na.rm = TRUE),
```
